title: 项目脚手架
user_visible_behavior: 开发者可以启动 Next.js 应用，并且 /api/health 返回 200。
verification: npm test 通过 scaffold 测试
npm run dev 可启动本地站点
evidence: Scaffold tests passed and the initial app/router structure is in place.

title: 词汇数据模型
user_visible_behavior: 系统可存储用户词条、词形、遭遇记录，并按 userId + lemma 查询。
verification: npm test 通过 vocab CRUD 结构测试
真实数据库可创建 Word 与 WordEncounter
evidence: Codex2 QA on 2026-05-13 verified migrations, npm test 8/8, and a real Prisma CRUD script returning forms [ir, fui, fueron, vas].

title: 阶段一课程：发音规则 + 300 高频词
user_visible_behavior: 用户可在 /learn/phase-1 查看发音规则、300 个高频词以及对应 TTS 音频。
verification: 300 个词条与音频资源存在
evidence: Codex2 QA on 2026-05-13 verified targetCount=300, 300 WAV files in public/audio/words, tests/course001.test.mjs 3/3, npm test 21/21, and build success.
notes: 音频资产当前为真实可播放 WAV。

title: 语法知识库：动词变位 + 阴阳性规则

verification: 内容包含 6 个核心动词与名词性别规则
evidence: Codex2 QA on 2026-05-13 confirmed grammar pages, conjugation content, and responsive layout requirements with npm test 21/21 and build success.
notes: 内容以静态内容文件维护。

title: 词库 Web 界面
user_visible_behavior: 登录用户可在 /vocab 查看按词根聚合的词条与遭遇记录。
verification: 词条按词根聚合并支持展开遭遇记录
evidence: Codex2 QA on 2026-05-13 verified auth redirect, server data loading shape, accordion structure, npm test 21/21, and build success.

title: Chrome 插件脚手架

title: YouTube 字幕提取 + 双语叠加

verification: content script 可注入字幕 overlay
翻译 route 与扩展构建通过

title: 词形还原 + 点击查词

verification: content script 包含逐词 span 与 lookup hooks
evidence: Codex2 QA on 2026-05-13 confirmed fui -> ir and hablan -> hablar, fixture spanCount=2, and npm test 30/30 with build success.

evidence: Codex2 QA on 2026-05-13 verified /api/vocab/highlight, extension highlight colors, top-level chrome guards, npm test 32/32, and build success.

title: Web 端词语高亮
user_visible_behavior: 课程词显示 #86EFAC，词库词显示 #93C5FD，未登录时静默降级。

title: 播放器页重设计：双列 transcript + 悬浮 related panel
user_visible_behavior: 访问 /watch?v=VIDEO_ID 时，用户看到左侧大播放器与视频信息、右侧整篇双语字幕面板，并可从右边缘展开相关视频覆层。
verification: watch/page.tsx 不再挂载 SubtitlePanel，改为 TranscriptPanel + RelatedPanel 新布局
TranscriptPanel 加载 /api/subtitle，逐条翻译并支持 ES+中 / 仅西语 / 仅中文 三态切换
点击 transcript cue 可以跳转视频时间点，活动 cue 自动滚动，手动滚动后可回到当前位置
RelatedPanel 支持 120ms 悬停展开、300ms 离开收起、点击固定
evidence: Codex2 QA 2026-05-15 09:06: npm test passed 49/49; npm run build passed; src/app/watch/page.tsx mounts TranscriptPanel and RelatedPanel and has no SubtitlePanel/WatchSidebar import or render; TranscriptPanel contains /api/subtitle, /api/translate, /api/vocab/highlight, LookupCard, seekTo, scrollIntoView, display modes ES + 中 / 仅西语 / 仅中文, and highlight colors #86EFAC/#93C5FD; RelatedPanel contains relatedVideos prop, 120ms open, 300ms close, pinned/pin toggle logic, and right-edge overlay/tab styling; node tests/web004.test.mjs passed 2/2; node tests/web007.test.mjs passed 2/2; feature_list.json parsed via PowerShell ConvertFrom-Json and Node require with WEB-007 previously ready_for_qa.
notes: 依赖 WEB-004/005/006。mockup-watch.html 为已批准样稿；本票仅交付桌面布局与 mock chapters，不含真实章节后端或移动端适配。

title: 9单元课程系统：总览页 + 单元详情页
user_visible_behavior: 用户可在 /learn 查看9个单元卡片，点击进入 /learn/[slug] 查看结构化词汇、对话、语法、练习和推荐视频。
verification: 左侧目录 sticky，点击锚点正确跳转
推荐视频区块显示缩略图，点击跳转 /watch?v=...
音频按钮：有 audioSrc 时可播放，无 audioSrc 时静默
折叠练习答案可展开收起
evidence: Codex2 QA 2026-05-15 14:43: npm test passed 61/61 including COURSE-003 assertions; npm run build passed and prerender output listed /learn plus /learn/unidad-1 through /learn/unidad-9; src/app/learn/page.tsx renders 9-card overview from getAllUnits with href `/learn/${unit.slug}`; src/app/learn/[slug]/page.tsx contains generateStaticParams, sticky TOC, vocab/phrases/dialogues/grammar/compare/exercises sections, <details>/<summary> answers, recommended video thumbnail from img.youtube.com, /watch?v= jump, and prev/next unit nav; src/app/components/audio/AudioButton.tsx returns immediately when src is empty, satisfying silent degrade.
notes: 数据源：content/curriculum/units-manifest.json + unidad-N.json（已全部就绪）。UI 规范：mockup-unidad-1.html。等待 Codex2 进行页面与结构验收。

title: 批量 TTS 音频生成：9单元课程音频
user_visible_behavior: 课程单元词汇、句型、对话的音频按钮可正常播放西语 TTS 音频。
verification: public/audio/units/unidad-N/ 目录下有对应 MP3 文件
每个 MP3 文件大小 > 1KB
所有 unidad-*.json 的 audioSrc 字段已填入正确路径
脚本重复运行结果一致（幂等）
浏览器中点击音频按钮可正常播放
evidence: Codex2 QA 2026-05-15 17:11: npm test passed 64/64; node tests/course004.test.mjs passed 3/3; npm run build passed; verified 362 MP3 files across public/audio/units/unidad-1 through unidad-9 with minimum size 8352 bytes and zero files <= 1KB; verified 361/361 vocab, phrase, and dialogue audioSrc fields are populated with /audio/units/unidad-N/*.mp3 paths and zero missing/invalid entries; reran node scripts/generate-unit-audio.mjs --unit=unidad-9 and all outputs hit the idempotent skip branch; served /learn/unidad-1 locally on port 3006 and confirmed HTTP 200 for both the lesson page and /audio/units/unidad-1/hola.mp3 with audio/mpeg content type, plus rendered audio button markup referencing generated MP3 assets.
notes: 使用 msedge-tts，声音 es-ES-AlvaroNeural，约340条音频，脚本路径 scripts/generate-unit-audio.mjs。可与 COURSE-003 并行。

title: 生词系统升级：词典查询 + 出处追踪 + 生词本展示
user_visible_behavior: 用户点击视频或课文中的生词，可看到词性、义项、例句；标记后进入生词本，每个词附带所有出处（视频可跳回，课文可跳回单元）。
verification: GET /api/vocab/lookup?word=vivían 返回完整词典数据
Redis 缓存生效：同一词第二次请求 < 10ms
LookupCard 显示词性、义项、例句
视频出处和课文出处都正确存入 WordEncounter
/vocab 页面展示出处列表，视频出处可跳回
有道 API 不可用时降级静默，不影响加入词库功能
evidence: Codex1 Dev 2026-05-15 22:36: implemented Prisma fields Word.dictData/partOfSpeech and WordEncounter.sourceType/courseRef with migration 20260515185000_add_dict_and_source_tracking; added GET /api/vocab/lookup backed by src/lib/dictionary.ts with Youdao env support, Redis key vocab:dict:${lemma}, and local fallback for vivir/hablar/ir; updated /api/lemmatize to share lookup logic; updated /api/vocab/add to persist dictData, partOfSpeech, sourceType, and courseRef; upgraded LookupCard to call /api/vocab/lookup, render partOfSpeech/meanings/examples/phonetic, and save video/course source metadata; added CourseLookupText to /learn/[slug] vocab/phrases/dialogues; upgraded /vocab display for dictionary summaries and video/course encounters; documented YOUDAO_APP_KEY/YOUDAO_APP_SECRET in .env.example; added tests/vocab004.test.mjs. Verification: npm test passed 70/70; npx prisma generate --no-engine passed after normal generate hit Windows DLL EPERM; npm run build passed with existing lint warnings and Node url.parse deprecation warnings only.
notes: 词典数据源：有道智云 API（需新增 YOUDAO_APP_KEY / YOUDAO_APP_SECRET 到 .env）。降级：有道不可用时用腾讯 TMT。依赖 VOCAB-001/002、WEB-005。课文点词需 COURSE-003 完成后接入。

title: 完整认证系统：Google OAuth + 邮箱密码
user_visible_behavior: 用户可通过 Google 登录，或使用邮箱密码注册、登录，并在失败时看到通用错误提示。
verification: 注册页可创建邮箱密码账号并自动登录
登录页可使用邮箱密码登录
密码错误显示通用错误提示
Google 用户 password 为 null 时拒绝 credentials 登录
evidence: Codex2 QA 2026-05-15 10:42: npm test passed 55/55; npm run build passed with existing SiteHeader img warning and Node url.parse deprecation warnings only; verified User.password String?, migration 20260515022642_add_user_password SQL adds password TEXT, bcryptjs and @types/bcryptjs dependencies, register route email/password validation + duplicate check + bcrypt.hash(password, 10) + prisma.user.create + status 201, auth CredentialsProvider + bcrypt.compare + Google password-null credentials rejection + jwt session + session.user.id callbacks and no database strategy, sign-in Google/credentials flows + CredentialsSignin error text, sign-up register fetch + credentials sign-in + sign-in link and no Google registration button; dev server smoke on port 3004 returned HTTP 200 for /auth/sign-in and /auth/sign-up.
notes: Codex2 functional QA passed. Google OAuth provider configuration and real external OAuth consent flow still depend on environment variables and provider setup.
